text.message: Yall gonna need to help me plow blue or it’s over
black, ill give you a nb to port some wheat
Safe to assume nobody will trade with you after that mono
Oj are you and black teaming?
yeah saw that after placing my b
the block should be 8 wood he have wood port
i still dont understand why u steal me
thought id get the full plow
So he just gets the gift of the win?
He had an open settle, if he plows you’re handing him the game
but not enough he win next turn
